extortion.description: Liberty Gold Fruit Company, Inc. is a family-owned business renowned for its premium quality food products and exceptional service since 1932. The company’s LIGO Brand boasts a presence on grocery shelves in 40 countries, primarily in Asia, Central America, and Europe, often ranking as a leading brand. With a commitment to excellence, Liberty Gold is one of the few remaining privately-owned companies in the industry. Its extensive distribution network ensures that their products reach a diverse clientele worldwide.
